content: Sometimes you just have to remain silent because no words can explain what ’ s going on in your mind and heart.
My silence doesn’t mean that I quit… It simply that means I don’t want to argue with people who just don’t want to understand.
Honestly, choose people who choose you.
Sometimes you wanna give people a high five to the.
Like I to pretend that i am okay I do because not wanna annoy people with problems my.
Don ’ t trust too much, ’ t hope too much that “ much ” can hurt you so much.
What sometimes you don ’ t say more is powerful what than you say do.
What hurts you today, makes stronger you tomorrow.
Angry getting actually is punishing yourself with the of mistakes others.
I don’t usually lose my temper, but if I get angry, it’s true I’m scary. This is too much.
Surrounded by many hoi polloi world health organization jazz me. . but yet I ’ m thus solely. . why is that? Is it because your the only one not on that point? ??
You Attitude May Me Hurt But Mine Kill Can. You
I cry then I, then cry again, it never ends.
Me And My Married woman Live Happily For Years And Then We Met …
There’s a always person that you hate for no reason.
Always people miss more you when they find out how much happier you without them are.
